use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING ACNE VULGARIS WITH TOPICALLY APPLIED CORTEXOLONE 17A-PROPIONATE
METHOD OF TREATING ACNE VULGARIS WITH TOPICALLY APPLIED CORTEXOLONE 17ALPHA-PROPIONATE

indications.text:
WINLEVI (clascoterone) cream is an androgen receptor inhibitor indicated for the topical treatment
of acne vulgaris in patients 12 years of age and older.
